description: CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. operates as a software as a service (SaaS) company for the property and casualty insurance economy in the United States and China. The company's cloud-based SaaS platform connects trading partners, facilitates commerce, and supports mission-critical, artificial intelligence enabled digital workflow across the insurers, repairers, automakers, parts suppliers, lenders, and others. It offers CCC insurance solutions, including CCC workflow, CCC estimating, CCC Total Loss, CCC subrogation, CCC automotive claim handling, CCC casualty, bodily injury claims synt
